title: ISic000091. I.Sicily inscription 000091
body:
Text encoding: Tuuli Ahlholm, Jonathan Prag
1[imp(eratori) Caes(ari) L(ucio) Septi]miọ
2[Severo Pertin]ạci Aug(usto)
3[Arabico Adiabe]nico pon-
4[tif(ici)] [max(imo)] ṭrib(unicia) · potest(ate) V imp(eratori)
5[VIII c]o(n)s(uli) II [p(atri)] [p(atriae)] [imp(eratoris)] Caesaris
6[di] vi M(arci) Aṇ[t]onini Germ(anici)
7[Sarm(atici) fi]l(io) divi Commodi
8[fratri] divi Antonini Pii
9[nepoti] [d] i [v] i Ḥadriani {pro}
10[pr] onepoti divi Traiani
11[P]arthici abnepoti divi
12Ṇervae adnepoti in-
13dulgentissimo et cle-
14mentissimo principi
15Maesia Fabia Titiana
16c(larissima) f(emina) et
17Maesius Fabius Titia-
18nus c(larissimus) p(uer)
19❦ ❦

Text encoding: Tuuli Ahlholm, Jonathan Prag
1[.............]MI.
2[............].CIAUG
3[.............]NICOPON
4[.......].RIB·POTESTVIMP
5[.....]OSII[........]CAESARIS
6[..]VIMA.[.]ONINIGERM
7[......]LDIVICOMMODI
8[......]DIVIANTONINIPII
9[.......]I[.]I.ADRIANIPRO
10[..]ONEPOTIDIVITRAIANI
11[.]ARTHICIABNEPOTIDIVI
12.ERVAEADNEPOTIIN
13DULGENTISSIMOETCLE
14MENTISSIMOPRINCIPI
15MAESIAFABIATITIANA
16CFET
17MAESIUSFABIUSTITIA
18NUSCP
19❦❦

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • Text of ILTermini

translation

commentary

bibliography

  • Mommsen 1883 7343 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000589
  • Manganaro 1988 76 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001427
  • Bivona 1994 7 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10002137
Line 1-18 25-30 Interlineation line 1 to 2
